rss:
Om.AI Blog — Vedic Astrology Guides & Insights https://omai.app/blog/ Learn Vedic astrology with in-depth guides on houses, planets, yogas, doshas, and current transits. Free educational content from Om.AI. en-us Thu, 26 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000
Mercury Retrograde February 2026: Survival Guide https://omai.app/blog/mercury-retrograde-february-2026.html Mercury goes retrograde on February 26, 2026 in Aquarius. Here's what to expect and how to navigate communication, travel, and technology disruptions. Thu, 26 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000 https://omai.app/blog/mercury-retrograde-february-2026.html
Mars Transit to Capricorn 2026: Effects for All 12 Ascendants https://omai.app/blog/mars-transit-capricorn-2026.html Mars enters exalted Capricorn on January 16, 2026. Learn how this powerful transit affects career, energy, and ambition for all 12 ascendants. Tue, 24 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000 https://omai.app/blog/mars-transit-capricorn-2026.html
Gaja Kesari Yoga: Meaning, Formation & Effects in Your Chart https://omai.app/blog/gaja-kesari-yoga-meaning-effects.html What is Gaja Kesari Yoga in Vedic astrology? Learn how this powerful Jupiter-Moon yoga forms, its effects on wealth and wisdom, and whether you have it. Sun, 22 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000 https://omai.app/blog/gaja-kesari-yoga-meaning-effects.html
Kundli Matching & Ashtakoot Guide: How Compatibility Works https://omai.app/blog/what-is-kundli-matching-ashtakoot.html Understand how Kundli matching works using the Ashtakoot (8-point) system. Learn what each koot means and how to interpret your compatibility score. Sun, 22 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000 https://omai.app/blog/what-is-kundli-matching-ashtakoot.html
Manglik Dosha: Truth, Myths & Remedies in Vedic Astrology https://omai.app/blog/manglik-dosha-truth-myths-remedies.html Is Manglik Dosha really dangerous for marriage? Learn the truth about Mangal Dosha, common myths debunked, and effective Vedic remedies. Sat, 21 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000 https://omai.app/blog/manglik-dosha-truth-myths-remedies.html
9 Planets (Navagraha) in Vedic Astrology — Roles & Significance https://omai.app/blog/9-planets-vedic-astrology.html Understand the 9 Vedic planets — Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu & Ketu — their meanings, rulerships, and effects in your horoscope. Fri, 20 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000 https://omai.app/blog/9-planets-vedic-astrology.html
12 Houses of Vedic Astrology Explained — Complete Guide https://omai.app/blog/12-houses-vedic-astrology.html Learn what each of the 12 houses (bhavas) in Vedic astrology represents — from personality and wealth to career and moksha. A complete beginner's guide. Fri, 20 Feb 2026 00:00:00 +0000 https://omai.app/blog/12-houses-vedic-astrology.html
Sade Sati: Saturn's 7.5-Year Transit Explained https://omai.app/blog/sade-sati-explained.html Learn what Sade Sati means, how Saturn's 7.5-year transit over your Moon sign works, its three phases, and traditional remedies. 2026-03-01 https://omai.app/blog/sade-sati-explained.html
How to Find Your Ascendant (Lagna) in Vedic Astrology https://omai.app/blog/how-to-find-your-ascendant.html Your Ascendant is the most important point in your Vedic birth chart. Learn what it is, why it matters, and how to calculate it. 2026-03-02 https://omai.app/blog/how-to-find-your-ascendant.html
Raj Yoga in Vedic Astrology: Formation, Types Effects https://omai.app/blog/raj-yoga-vedic-astrology.html What Raj Yoga really means, how it forms through Kendra-Trikona connections, and what it indicates in your birth chart. 2026-03-03 https://omai.app/blog/raj-yoga-vedic-astrology.html
